display_text: Rubick Aghanim's Scepter: Spell Steal — Counters enemy reliance on powerful spells by stealing two abilities and upgrading them to Scepter versions. This transforms Rubick into a hyper-versatile threat, capable of adapting to any teamfight scenario with enhanced spellcasting range and upgraded stolen abilities.
search_text: Rubick Aghanim Scepter Spell Steal counter-spellcasting anti-utility versatility spell upgrade

display_text: Rubick Aghanim's Shard: Telekinesis — Counters enemy positioning and initiation by allowing Rubick to reposition allies or himself with increased throw range and reduced delay. This enables safer initiation, escape, or disruption of enemy engagements, shifting Rubick into a flexible support role.
search_text: Rubick Aghanim Shard Telekinesis counter-positioning anti-initiation ally reposition escape utility
